 27→sealed interface Binding {
 28→    data class GestureInput(val gesture: Gesture) : Binding {
 29→        override fun toDisplayString(context: Context): String = gesture.toDisplayString(context)
 30→        override fun toString() = buildString {
 31→            append(GESTURE_PREFIX)
 32→            append(gesture)
 33→        }
 34→    }
 35→
 36→    /**
 37→     * Maps an extremity on an [Axis] to a button press
 38→     *
 39→     * Example: [Axis.X] with a thresholds of {-1, 1} may be mapped to different actions
 40→     * (signifying moving left/right on a gamepad joystick)
 41→     */
 42→    data class AxisButtonBinding(val axis: Axis, val threshold: Float) : Binding {
 43→        private val plusOrMinus get() = if (threshold == -1f) "-" else "+"
 44→
 45→        override fun toDisplayString(context: Context) = "$JOYSTICK_STRING_PREFIX $axis [$plusOrMinus]"
 46→
 47→        override fun toString() = buildString {
 48→            append(JOYSTICK_CHAR_PREFIX)
 49→            append(axis.motionEventValue)
 50→            append(" ")
 51→            append(threshold)
 52→        }
 53→
 54→        companion object {
 55→            fun from(preferenceString: String): AxisButtonBinding {
 56→                val s = preferenceString.split(" ")
 57→
 58→                val axis = Axis.fromInt(s[0].toInt())
 59→                val threshold = s[1].toFloat()
 60→
 61→                return AxisButtonBinding(axis, threshold)
 62→            }
 63→        }
 64→    }
 65→
 66→    interface KeyBinding : Binding {
 67→        val modifierKeys: ModifierKeys
 68→    }
 69→
 70→    data class KeyCode(val keycode: Int, override val modifierKeys: ModifierKeys = ModifierKeys.none()) : KeyBinding {
 71→
 72→        private fun getKeyCodePrefix(): String = when {
 73→            KeyEvent.isGamepadButton(keycode) -> GAMEPAD_PREFIX
 74→            else -> KEY_PREFIX.toString()
 75→        }
 76→
 77→        override fun toDisplayString(context: Context): String = buildString {
 78→            append(getKeyCodePrefix())
 79→            append(' ')
 80→            append(modifierKeys.toString())
 81→            val keyCodeString = KeyEvent.keyCodeToString(keycode)
 82→            // replace "Button" as we use the gamepad icon
 83→            append(StringUtil.toTitleCase(keyCodeString.replace("KEYCODE_", "").replace("BUTTON_", "").replace('_', ' ')))
 84→        }
 85→
 86→        override fun toString() = buildString {
 87→            append(KEY_PREFIX)
 88→            append(modifierKeys.toString())
 89→            append(keycode)
 90→        }
 91→    }
 92→
 93→    data class UnicodeCharacter(val unicodeCharacter: Char, override val modifierKeys: ModifierKeys = AppDefinedModifierKeys.allowShift()) : KeyBinding {
 94→        override fun toDisplayString(context: Context): String = buildString {
 95→            append(KEY_PREFIX)
 96→            append(' ')
 97→            append(modifierKeys.toString())
 98→            append(unicodeCharacter)
 99→        }
100→
101→        override fun toString(): String = buildString {
102→            append(UNICODE_PREFIX)
103→            append(modifierKeys.toString())
104→            append(unicodeCharacter)
105→        }
106→    }
107→
108→    data object UnknownBinding : Binding {
109→        override fun toDisplayString(context: Context): String = ""
110→        override fun toString(): String = ""
111→        override val isValid: Boolean
112→            get() = false
113→    }
114→
115→    fun toDisplayString(context: Context): String
116→
117→    /** how the binding is serialised to preferences */
118→    abstract override fun toString(): String
119→
120→    val isValid get() = true
121→
122→    open class ModifierKeys internal constructor(val shift: Boolean, val ctrl: Boolean, val alt: Boolean) {
123→        fun matches(event: KeyEvent): Boolean {
124→            // return false if Ctrl+1 is pressed and 1 is expected
125→            return shiftMatches(event) && ctrlMatches(event) && altMatches(event)
126→        }
127→
128→        private fun shiftMatches(event: KeyEvent): Boolean = shift == event.isShiftPressed
129→
130→        private fun ctrlMatches(event: KeyEvent): Boolean = ctrl == event.isCtrlPressed
131→
132→        private fun altMatches(event: KeyEvent): Boolean = altMatches(event.isAltPressed)
133→
134→        open fun shiftMatches(shiftPressed: Boolean): Boolean = shift == shiftPressed
135→
136→        fun ctrlMatches(ctrlPressed: Boolean): Boolean = ctrl == ctrlPressed
137→
138→        fun altMatches(altPressed: Boolean): Boolean = alt == altPressed
139→
140→        override fun toString() = buildString {
141→            if (ctrl) append("Ctrl+")
142→            if (alt) append("Alt+")
143→            if (shift) append("Shift+")
144→        }
145→
146→        fun semiStructuralEquals(keys: ModifierKeys): Boolean {
147→            if (this.alt != keys.alt || this.ctrl != keys.ctrl) {
148→                return false
149→            }
150→            // shiftMatches may be overridden
151→            return (
152→                this.shiftMatches(true) == keys.shiftMatches(true) ||
153→                    this.shiftMatches(false) == keys.shiftMatches(false)
154→                )
155→        }
156→
157→        companion object {
158→            fun none(): ModifierKeys = ModifierKeys(shift = false, ctrl = false, alt = false)
159→
160→            fun ctrl(): ModifierKeys = ModifierKeys(shift = false, ctrl = true, alt = false)
161→
162→            fun shift(): ModifierKeys = ModifierKeys(shift = true, ctrl = false, alt = false)
163→
164→            fun alt(): ModifierKeys = ModifierKeys(shift = false, ctrl = false, alt = true)
165→
166→            /**
167→             * Parses a [ModifierKeys] from a string.
168→             * @param s The string to parse
169→             * @return The [ModifierKeys], and the remainder of the string
170→             */
171→            fun parse(s: String): Pair<ModifierKeys, String> {
172→                val plusIndex = s.lastIndexOfOrNull('+') ?: return Pair(none(), s)
173→                val modifiers = fromString(s.substring(0, plusIndex + 1))
174→                return Pair(modifiers, s.substring(plusIndex + 1))
175→            }
176→
177→            fun fromString(from: String): ModifierKeys =
178→                ModifierKeys(from.contains("Shift"), from.contains("Ctrl"), from.contains("Alt"))
179→        }
180→    }
181→
182→    /** Modifier keys which cannot be defined by a binding  */
183→    private class AppDefinedModifierKeys private constructor() : ModifierKeys(false, false, false) {
184→        override fun shiftMatches(shiftPressed: Boolean): Boolean = true
185→
186→        companion object {
187→            /**
188→             * Specifies a keycode combination binding from an unknown input device
189→             * Should be due to the "default" key bindings and never from user input
190→             *
191→             * If we do not know what the device is, "*" could be a key on the keyboard or Shift + 8
192→             *
193→             * So we need to ignore shift, rather than match it to a value
194→             *
195→             * If we have bindings in the app, then we know whether we need shift or not (in actual fact, we should
196→             * be fine to use keycodes).
197→             */
198→            fun allowShift(): ModifierKeys = AppDefinedModifierKeys()
199→        }
200→    }
201→
202→    companion object {
203→        const val FORBIDDEN_UNICODE_CHAR = MappableBinding.PREF_SEPARATOR
204→
205→        /**
206→         * https://www.fileformat.info/info/unicode/char/2328/index.htm (Keyboard)
207→         */
208→        const val KEY_PREFIX = '\u2328'
209→
210→        /** https://www.fileformat.info/info/unicode/char/235d/index.htm (similar to a finger)  */
211→        const val GESTURE_PREFIX = '\u235D'
212→
213→        /** 🕹️*/
214→        const val JOYSTICK_STRING_PREFIX = "\uD83D\uDD79\uFE0F"
215→
216→        /** Can only use one char - pick a circle (wheel) */
217→        const val JOYSTICK_CHAR_PREFIX: Char = '◯'
218→
219→        /** https://www.fileformat.info/info/unicode/char/2705/index.htm - checkmark (often used in URLs for unicode)
220→         * Only used for serialisation. [KEY_PREFIX] is used for display.
221→         */
222→        const val UNICODE_PREFIX = '\u2705'
223→
224→        const val GAMEPAD_PREFIX = "🎮"
225→
226→        /**
227→         * This returns multiple bindings due to the "default" implementation not knowing what the keycode for a button is
228→         */
229→        fun possibleKeyBindings(event: KeyEvent): List<KeyBinding> {
230→            val modifiers = ModifierKeys(event.isShiftPressed, event.isCtrlPressed, event.isAltPressed)
231→            val ret: MutableList<KeyBinding> = ArrayList()
232→            event.keyCode.ifNotZero { keyCode -> ret.add(keyCode(keyCode, modifiers)) }
233→
234→            // passing in metaState: 0 means that Ctrl+1 returns '1' instead of '\0'
235→            // NOTE: We do not differentiate on upper/lower case via KeyEvent.META_CAPS_LOCK_ON
236→            event.getUnicodeChar(event.metaState and (KeyEvent.META_SHIFT_ON or KeyEvent.META_NUM_LOCK_ON))
237→                .ifNotZero { unicodeChar ->
238→                    try {
239→                        ret.add(unicode(unicodeChar.toChar(), modifiers) as KeyBinding)
240→                    } catch (e: Exception) {
241→                        // very slight chance it returns unknown()
242→                        Timber.w(e)
243→                    }
244→                }
245→
246→            return ret
247→        }
248→
249→        fun fromString(from: String): Binding {
250→            if (from.isEmpty()) return UnknownBinding
251→            try {
252→                return when (from[0]) {
253→                    JOYSTICK_CHAR_PREFIX -> AxisButtonBinding.from(from.substring(1))
254→                    GESTURE_PREFIX -> GestureInput(Gesture.valueOf(from.substring(1)))
255→                    UNICODE_PREFIX -> {
256→                        val (modifierKeys, char) = ModifierKeys.parse(from.substring(1))
257→                        UnicodeCharacter(char[0], modifierKeys)
258→                    }
259→                    KEY_PREFIX -> {
260→                        val (modifierKeys, keyCodeAsString) = ModifierKeys.parse(from.substring(1))
261→                        val keyCode = keyCodeAsString.toInt()
262→                        KeyCode(keyCode, modifierKeys)
263→                    }
264→                    else -> UnknownBinding
265→                }
266→            } catch (ex: Exception) {
267→                Timber.w(ex)
268→            }
269→            return UnknownBinding
270→        }
271→
272→        fun unicode(modifierKeys: ModifierKeys, unicodeChar: Char): Binding = unicode(unicodeChar, modifierKeys)
273→
274→        /**
275→         * Specifies a unicode binding from an unknown input device
276→         * See [AppDefinedModifierKeys]
277→         */
278→        fun unicode(unicodeChar: Char, modifierKeys: ModifierKeys = AppDefinedModifierKeys.allowShift()): Binding {
279→            if (unicodeChar == FORBIDDEN_UNICODE_CHAR) return unknown()
280→            return UnicodeCharacter(unicodeChar, modifierKeys)
281→        }
282→
283→        fun keyCode(keyCode: Int, modifiers: ModifierKeys = ModifierKeys.none()) = KeyCode(keyCode, modifiers)
284→        fun keyCode(modifiers: ModifierKeys, keyCode: Int) = KeyCode(keyCode, modifiers)
285→        fun gesture(gesture: Gesture) = GestureInput(gesture)
286→
287→        @VisibleForTesting
288→        fun unknown() = UnknownBinding
289→    }
290→}
